title: ligularia amplectens var. holmii
intro: Ligularia amplectens var. holmii is a plant species, commonly known as 'Holm's Ligularia', belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ligularia amplectens var. holmii include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol to extract its bioactive compounds.
